title: Linux Hosts File Modification
description: Detects modification of /etc/hosts or /etc/resolv.conf. Attackers modify these to redirect traffic, bypass security controls, or perform DNS hijacking.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*/etc/hosts*' or msg like '*/etc/resolv.conf*')))
